hero.label: Advertisement
hero.title: Promote your CRO service, affiliate offer, or featured partner here.
hero.text: This wide banner is ideal for your best monetization slot: a premium partner, your own service, an affiliate tool, or a lead-generation offer.

sidebar.label: Advertisement
sidebar.title: This sidebar slot works well for affiliate tools, CRO templates, or your own consultation offer.
sidebar.text: Keep this one short and focused so it feels native to the audit workflow.

inline.label: Advertisement
inline.title: Offer a related CRO resource right before the recommendations list.
inline.text: Good examples: an audit service, heatmap tool, Shopify app, email platform, or your own premium analysis package.

footer.label: Advertisement
footer.title: Reserve this footer space for a final CTA, affiliate partner, or your own premium offer.
footer.text: This slot stays visible near the end of the experience, which makes it useful for soft-conversion offers after the user has consumed the report.
